question: Which text is displayed as the main title on the introductory card? A. POINT & CLICK APPLIANCE REPAIR B. Replacing a Fabric Softener Dispenser C. Softener Dispenser D. [saw-fuh-ner] [dih-spen-ser]

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A woman with dark hair pulled back wears a blue cardigan over a black top and grey work gloves. She stands beside a white top-loading washing machine with a silver control panel. A black metal toolbox with a silver latch sits on a surface to her right. The logo 'POINT & CLICK APPLIANCE REPAIR' is in the top left corner. A white thermostat is mounted on the wall behind her.

canonical_answer: At 0s, a woman wearing gloves stands beside a white washing machine with a toolbox nearby; at 14s, a title card reading 'Replacing a Fabric Softener Dispenser' appears on screen; at 18s, an image of a translucent white plastic dispenser is shown with phonetic text below it.

canonical_answer: The hand wipes the central column of the agitator with a cloth.
